subtitles.original: 本能で、裸の
subtitles.english: With our instincts, bare...

subtitles.original: どうしても ホームワークよりも重要課題
subtitles.english: No matter what, this is more important than homework.

subtitles.original: 放課後のお茶 おしゃべり 練習
subtitles.english: After-school tea, chatting, and practice!

subtitles.original: ユーモア ナチュラル
subtitles.english: Humor, natural...

subtitles.original: めくるめく 笑い ウケ過ぎでお腹痛い
subtitles.english: dazzling laughter, laughing so hard our stomachs hurt!

subtitles.original: 呼吸(いき)ぴったりexcellent! でも苦手なリフまだあったの
subtitles.english: In perfect sync, excellent! But there's still a riff I'm bad at.

subtitles.original: 特訓つきあってくれる?
subtitles.english: Will you practice with me?

subtitles.original: もう少し門限まで だって帰りたくない
subtitles.english: Just a bit longer until curfew, because I don't want to go home yet!

subtitles.original: never never... can't say good-bye
subtitles.english: Never, never... can't say goodbye!

subtitles.original: めちゃめちゃ大好き!!
subtitles.english: I love you all so incredibly much!!

subtitles.original: 超絶 ぞっこん ル ララ wonderful show time
subtitles.english: Extremely, head over heels, lu-la-la, wonderful show time!

subtitles.original: 音楽って 音楽って もう私達まんま
subtitles.english: Music, music is just exactly who we are!

subtitles.original: スタンディングオベーション賞 オーディエンスなしでも
subtitles.english: A standing ovation, even without an audience!

subtitles.original: 奏でたい 瞬間(とき)のrealを
subtitles.english: We want to play the reality of this moment!

subtitles.original: 昨日の後悔って 明日の心配って
subtitles.english: Regrets from yesterday, worries about tomorrow...

subtitles.original: ぶっちゃけ ぶっちゃけ 誰得?何得?
subtitles.english: To be honest, to be honest, who does that help? What's the point?

subtitles.original: ラッキーはいつだってね “今” つかむもの
subtitles.english: Luck is always something you grab in the "now"!

subtitles.original: 欲張れ 乙女 与えられん、さらばだ
subtitles.english: Be greedy, girls! If nothing is given, then farewell!

subtitles.original: どんな本も書いてない
subtitles.english: It's not written in any book,

subtitles.original: 授業じゃちょっと教わらない
subtitles.english: and not taught in classes,

subtitles.original: けど一生忘れない
subtitles.english: but we'll never forget it for the rest of our lives!

subtitles.original: この世にないと思ってた奇跡
subtitles.english: A miracle we thought didn't exist in this world...

subtitles.original: 一緒にね歌えば
subtitles.english: If we sing together,

subtitles.original: 信じられるんだ 強くなれるんだ
subtitles.english: we can believe in it, we can become stronger!

subtitles.original: みんなが大好き!!
subtitles.english: We love you all!!

subtitles.original: 延々続行 ル ララ miracle sing time
subtitles.english: Endlessly continuing, lu-la-la, miracle sing time!

subtitles.original: 歌って 歌って 愛伝える最強手段
subtitles.english: Singing, singing, the ultimate way to convey love!

subtitles.original: つたない曲でも 微妙な歌詞でも
subtitles.english: Even with a clumsy song, or awkward lyrics,

subtitles.original: 届けたい精一杯のsoul 等身大のlifeを
subtitles.english: we want to deliver our full soul and our real-size life!

subtitles.original: 今日は昨日みたい? 明日は今日みたい?
subtitles.english: Is today like yesterday? Is tomorrow like today?

subtitles.original: 大丈夫大丈夫 楽しかったら大正解
subtitles.english: It's okay, it's okay, if you had fun, that's the perfect answer!

subtitles.original: ロッカーはいつだってね “今” やんちゃ盛り
subtitles.english: Rockers are always in their prime mischievous phase "now"!

subtitles.original: 進め 乙女 抱きしめて、希望を
subtitles.english: Move forward, girls! Embrace your hopes!

subtitles.original: 大好き
subtitles.english: We love you,

subtitles.original: 大好き
subtitles.english: we love you,

subtitles.original: 大好きをありがとう
subtitles.english: thank you for all the love!

subtitles.original: 歌うよ
subtitles.english: We'll sing,

subtitles.original: 歌うよ
subtitles.english: we'll sing,

subtitles.original: 心こめて 今日も歌うよ
subtitles.english: from our hearts, we will sing today as well!

subtitles.original: 大好き
subtitles.english: We love you,

subtitles.original: 大好き
subtitles.english: we love you,

subtitles.original: 大好きをありがとう
subtitles.english: thank you for all the love!

subtitles.original: 歌うよ
subtitles.english: We'll sing,

subtitles.original: 歌うよ
subtitles.english: we'll sing,

subtitles.original: 愛をこめて ずっと歌うよ
subtitles.english: with all our love, we'll sing forever!

subtitles.english: We will soon be changing the channel.

subtitles.english: Please stay seated,

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation for "Utauyo!! MIRACLE" Segment**

Okay, so I need to generate accurate subtitles for this video segment. It's the song "Utauyo!! MIRACLE" by Houkago Tea Time, followed by a chat segment. The challenge is nailing the timing and creating clean subtitles according to the instructions. I've listened closely and analyzed the audio track thoroughly.

First, I identified and transcribed the song lyrics (Japanese and English). I meticulously checked the start times to make sure they're perfect. It starts mid-song, so I'm paying extra attention to the opening line. I'm also double-checking the lyrics against the official source to catch any subtle variations in the vocals. Then, I needed to make sure all of the subtitles are precise in time, so I had to make micro adjustments. I'm also keeping the English translation natural and ensuring line lengths stay within the character limit. I'm also doing a crosscheck with the instructions to make sure I am following the instructions precisely.

For the chat segment, I transcribed all the English spoken lines, paying careful attention to the different voices and their timings. I've double-checked all the timestamps for accuracy, ensuring they match the spoken words exactly. I also removed any elements such as closed captions tags. Now, with all of this done, the process is complete.
